name: french rolls
instructions: 2 tsp salt, 3.5 cups all-purpose flour, 1 tbsp yeast, 2 tbsp wheat flour. bake at 425.
notes: not happy with it — comes out too salty, dense, and plain. next time: drop salt by 0.5 tsp (to 1.5 tsp), do 3 cups all-purpose + 0.5 cup wheat flour, bump yeast to 1.5 tbsp.
